overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic dystopian city. The player traverses an elevated highway overpass, descends a ramp to street level, navigates a pedestrian intersection, and continues along a neon-lit commercial sidewalk with palm trees and storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway overpass with billboard advertisements

events.description: white sedan vehicle passes by on the right side of the overpass
slight leftward drift while continuing to walk forward along the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated highway overpass with concrete barriers on the left

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past on the highway heading in the same direction

entered.detail: gray concrete divider with metal rail on top separating the walkway from the drop
large red illuminated billboard advertising CHOOH2 fuel with white text
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
communications tower with red warning lights blinking at the top
tall modern street lamps illuminating the wet asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway overpass at night, with the player walking forward along the wet asphalt. A concrete barrier runs along the left side, while a prominent red CHOOH2 billboard and futuristic megabuilding dominate the skyline ahead. A white sedan passes by on the right as the camera moves steadily forward under artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp from overpass to street level with mixed architecture

events.description: exiting the elevated highway onto a descending ramp toward street level
entering area with increased neon signage illumination from street-level businesses

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking down the ramp from the overpass to street level, approaching the neon-lit district

entered.detail: low building with traditional curved Asian roof and satellite dishes on top
circular building with bright neon signage and multiple advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player turns right onto a descending ramp leaving the highway, transitioning from the open overpass to a more enclosed street-level approach. A distinctive building with a traditional pagoda-style roof appears on the left, while a circular neon-lit diner becomes visible on the right. The concrete barrier recedes into the distance as the descent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: approaching crosswalk with red pedestrian signal illuminated
turning right at the intersection to follow the street along the commercial district

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection among a group of pedestrians while navigating the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing with backpack walking across the crosswalk

entered.detail: pedestrian traffic light showing red hand symbol indicating do not walk
tall palm trees lining the street with sparse foliage
small commercial shops with bright neon signs and illuminated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Having reached street level, the player navigates a busy intersection with a moderate crowd of pedestrians crossing the wet asphalt. A red crosswalk signal is visible on the left, while palm trees and neon-lit vendor stalls line the right side of the street. The player turns right at the intersection, moving deeper into the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with food vendors and illuminated storefronts

events.description: passing by brightly lit burrito food stall with red neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various neon-lit storefronts and vending machines

entered.detail: food stand with red neon BURRITO sign and illuminated menu
large illuminated dome structure visible in the distant background
row of brightly illuminated vending machines on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing by a brightly lit burrito food stall and rows of vending machines. The distant stadium structure is visible ahead, glowing against the night sky. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights from the surrounding commercial establishments as the walk continues down the urban street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a high-altitude highway overpass down into the neon-drenched heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins with a steady walk along wet asphalt under artificial street lighting, passing a red CHOOH2 billboard and towering megabuildings. As the camera turns right onto a descending ramp, the open skyline gives way to a more enclosed street-level approach featuring a pagoda-style roof and a circular neon diner. The scene then opens into a busy intersection where the camera navigates through crowds of pedestrians and past palm trees before turning right into the commercial zone. Finally, the movement continues along a concrete sidewalk lined with glowing vending machines and a burrito stall, with the wet pavement reflecting colorful lights as a distant stadium glows against the night sky.
